title: Senior Backend Developer
description: Ekibimize katılacak, aşağıdaki konularda deneyimli Senior Backend Developer arıyoruz: Aranan Nitelikler - Python ile backend geliştirme tecrübesi - FastAPI ve Django framework'lerine hakim - Mikroservis mimarileri konusunda deneyimli - Kubernetes ortamlarında geliştirme ve operasyon süreçlerinde tecrübeli - RabbitMQ veya benzeri mesaj kuyruk sistemleri üzerinde çalışmış - GitLab ve CI/CD süreçlerine hakim - REST API geliştirme ve entegrasyon deneyimi - AI/LLM tabanlı servisler ve entegrasyonlar geliştirme deneyimi - Yazılım geliştirme alanında en az 10 yıl deneyimli ve çeşitli projelerde görev almış - Üniversitelerin Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği, Bilgisayar Bilimleri veya ilgili bölümlerinden mezun Çalışma Koşulları: - Tamamen uzaktan ve esnek saatli çalışma imkânı - Tam zamanlı çalışma düzeniyle, freelance sözleşme modeli Ölçeklenebilir sistemler tasarlamaktan ve yüksek kaliteli yazılım geliştirmekten keyif alan, teknik sorumluluk üstlenebilecek ve ürünün gelişimine katkı sağlayacak ekip arkadaşlarıyla tanışmayı hedefliyoruz.

title: Senior Backend GoLang Developer (Cybersecurity)
description: Acronis is a world leader in cyber protection, delivering natively integrated solutions that monitor, control, and protect the data that businesses and lives depend on. Driven by our passion to protect every workload, we’ve built the industry’s only all-in-one cyber protection platform. We are looking for a Senior Backend Developer to join our mission of protecting the digital world. You would be responsible for developing services that are scalable and maintainable, can handle huge load and big volume of real-time data. You will ensure that these applications are well documented and has a reasonable test coverage. You will coordinate with the rest of the team working on different layers of the infrastructure. A commitment to collaborative problem solving, sophisticated design, and quality product is essential. What You'll Do Designing and developing scalable, robust, testable, efficient, and easily maintainable code Translating software requirements into stable, working, high performance software Playing a key role in architectural and design decisions, building toward an efficient micro services distributed architecture Creating design documents What You Bring 5+ years of experience in software development with Go programming language Ability to design, develop, and maintain RESTful APIs Experience with SQL databases (e.g., PostgreSQL) Experience with Artifactory, Kubernetes, and Ansible orchestration engine Experience with monitoring tools such as Prometheus, Grafana, and Kibana Good skills in writing unit tests, integration tests, and debugging Go applications Knowledge of database architecture and design Ability to interpret written requirements, technical specification documents and to create design documents Good English communication skills, including verbal and written abilities Would Be a Plus Experience with noSQL databases (e.g.,Redis, ClickHouse) Experience with Scrum/Kanban, Git, JIRA Experience with CI/CD pipelines and tools (e.g., Jenkins) Hands-on experience using AI agents and assistants for software design, code generation, and refactoring Experience with spec-driven or contract-first development Ability to review AI-generated output for correctness, security, performance, and maintainability Hands-on experience with Rust Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities Please submit your resume and application in English Who We Are A Swiss company founded in Singapore in 2003, Acronis offers over twenty years of innovation with 15 offices worldwide and more than 1800 employees in 50+ countries. Acronis Cyber Protect is available in 26 languages in 150 countries and is used by over 20,000 service providers to protect over 750,000 businesses. Our corporate culture is focused on making a positive impact on the lives of each employee and the communities we serve. Mutual trust, respect and belief that we can contribute to the world everyday are the cornerstones of our team. Each member of our “A-Team” plays an instrumental role in driving the success of our innovative and expanding business. We seek individuals who excel in dynamic, global environments and have a never give up attitude, contributing to our collective growth and impact. OUR INTERVIEW PRACTICES To ensure a fair and genuine hiring process, candidates are expected to participate in interviews without the use of AI tools, automated prompts, or third-party assistance. Interviews are designed to assess individual skills, experience, and communication style and we value authentic, real-time interaction. Use of AI or external assistance during live interviews may result in disqualification. For roles where AI skills are being evaluated, permitted use of AI tools will be clearly communicated in advance. Candidates may be asked to disable virtual backgrounds or participate in in-person interviews. All employment offers are contingent upon successful completion of applicable criminal, education and identity background checks Acronis is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, color, marital status, national origin, physical or mental disability, medical condition, protected veteran status, race, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by applicable laws, regulations and ordinances.

title: Lead Backend Engineer & Architect
description: About Us BEM Funding is a technology organization operating in the financial technology sector, managing high-volume user-facing processes and critical operational workflows. As part of our growth plans, we are looking for experienced professionals to help build reliable, scalable, and sustainable product and operational infrastructure. Project-specific details will be shared during the interview process in accordance with our confidentiality principles. About the Role This role will be responsible for the architectural design, technical leadership, and production-grade development of critical backend services. The ideal candidate is expected to demonstrate strong engineering expertise in reliable data processing, high availability, transaction integrity, performance optimization, and operational continuity. Key Responsibilities Design and develop backend architectures capable of handling high-volume event processing and data-intensive workloads. Ensure critical business rules are implemented in a reliable, traceable, and testable manner. Take technical ownership of database design, performance optimization, indexing strategies, and scalability initiatives. Apply best practices for inter-service communication, fault tolerance, retries, backoff strategies, idempotency, and operational reliability. Provide technical leadership regarding code quality, architectural standards, engineering practices, and technical decision-making. Contribute to production operations, observability, monitoring, alerting, and continuous operational improvements. Required Qualifications 7+ years of backend development experience with strong production-level expertise in the Python ecosystem. Advanced experience with FastAPI, RESTful API design, asynchronous programming, and microservice architectures. Proven hands-on experience building and operating event-driven or streaming systems using Kafka, Redis Streams, or similar messaging/event-processing technologies. Deep knowledge of PostgreSQL, data modeling, indexing strategies, transaction management, and query optimization. Strong understanding of distributed systems concepts, including idempotency, retry/backoff mechanisms, concurrency, rate limiting, observability, and failure handling. Experience with CI/CD pipelines, containerization, and production deployment processes; Docker experience is required and Kubernetes knowledge is highly desirable. Ability to justify, document, communicate, and lead technical decisions across engineering teams. Professional English proficiency sufficient to work with technical documentation and API specifications. Technology Stack & Expected Experience Backend & API: Python, FastAPI, async/await, REST APIs, OpenAPI, Pydantic, service-layer architecture, and clean architecture principles. Microservices & Distributed Systems: Microservice design, inter-service communication, idempotency, retry/backoff mechanisms, circuit breakers, outbox/inbox patterns. Event Processing & Streaming: Apache Kafka, Redis Streams, event-driven architectures, consumer groups, partitioning, ordering, dead-letter queues, and a solid understanding of exactly-once and at-least-once delivery semantics. Data Layer: PostgreSQL, SQLAlchemy or similar ORM frameworks, migration management, transaction isolation, indexing, query tuning, and connection pooling. Caching & Performance: Redis, cache invalidation strategies, rate limiting, performance profiling, and high-volume read/write workloads. DevOps & Operations: Docker, CI/CD pipelines, Kubernetes (preferred), logging, metrics, tracing, alerting, incident response, and postmortem processes. Security & Financial Systems: Authentication and authorization, secret management, audit logging, data integrity, transaction security, and awareness of regulatory compliance requirements. Nice to Have Experience in financial technology, transaction-processing infrastructure, payment systems, or other regulated and operationally sensitive environments. Familiarity with cloud infrastructure, observability platforms, security best practices, and production-readiness processes. Experience designing, re-architecting, or modernizing performance-critical services and migrating legacy systems to modern architectures. Practical familiarity with event sourcing, CQRS, the outbox pattern, saga, and similar distributed transaction patterns. Working Model & Application Process The working model and benefits package will be shared during the HR process in accordance with company policies. Applicants are expected to submit: • A short CV/resume • GitHub profile and/or portfolio links (if available) • A brief note highlighting their strongest full-stack project experience

title: Platform Engineer – Cloud, DevOps & Backend Infrastructure
description: About Us BEM Funding is a technology organization operating in the financial technology sector, managing high-volume user-facing processes and critical operational workflows. As part of our growth plans, we are looking for experienced professionals to help build reliable, scalable, and sustainable product and operational infrastructure. Project-specific details will be shared during the interview process in accordance with our confidentiality principles. About the Role We are looking for an experienced Platform Engineer to help build and operate production-grade cloud and backend infrastructure for a rapidly growing fintech organization. In this role, you will take ownership of AWS cloud infrastructure, Infrastructure as Code (IaC), CI/CD pipelines, observability, security, and microservices-based backend platforms. You will work closely with our Lead Backend Engineer/Architect to establish engineering standards, event-driven architectures, messaging and streaming systems, and operational reliability practices. Key Responsibilities Design, build, and operate scalable and maintainable AWS cloud infrastructure. Implement and manage infrastructure using Terraform or similar Infrastructure as Code tools. Establish and improve CI/CD pipelines and deployment automation. Own service deployment standards, configuration management, secrets management, and environment isolation strategies. Support production operations of Kafka, Redis Streams, and other event-driven systems. Build and maintain observability platforms including logging, metrics, tracing, alerting, and dashboards. Implement security best practices, IAM policies, network isolation, backup, and disaster recovery procedures. Lead incident management, operational documentation, runbooks, and post-mortem improvement processes. Develop internal tools, automation scripts, and backend services when required, primarily using Python. Collaborate with backend engineering teams to define standards for scalability, resiliency, retry strategies, idempotency, and observability. Required Qualifications 5+ years of experience in DevOps, SRE, Platform Engineering, or production infrastructure roles. Strong hands-on experience building and operating production environments on AWS. Advanced knowledge of Terraform or similar Infrastructure as Code tools. Experience with CI/CD pipelines and modern software delivery practices. Hands-on experience with Docker and container orchestration platforms such as Kubernetes and ECS. Experience with observability tools such as Prometheus, Grafana, OpenTelemetry, ELK/OpenSearch, and CloudWatch. Proficiency in Python for automation, tooling, or backend service development. Strong understanding of microservices architecture and deployment strategies. Experience operating Redis, Redis Streams, Kafka, or similar messaging and streaming platforms. Familiarity with PostgreSQL operations, migrations, backup/restore processes, and performance monitoring. Solid understanding of IAM, secrets management, network security, least-privilege access, and audit logging. Strong communication and documentation skills. Technology Stack & Expected Experience Infrastructure & Cloud: AWS, Terraform, VPC, IAM, Security Groups, Load Balancers, Auto Scaling, managed database and cache services. Containers & Deployment: Docker, Kubernetes (EKS), AWS ECS, blue-green deployments, canary releases, rolling updates, and rollback strategies. CI/CD: GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, ArgoCD, automated testing, build, release, and deployment pipelines. Backend Platform: Python, FastAPI, microservices architecture, configuration management, secrets management, and service lifecycle ownership. Event-Driven Systems: Kafka, Redis Streams, background workers, asynchronous job processing, retry/backoff strategies, dead-letter queues, and idempotency patterns. Data & Caching: PostgreSQL, Redis, database migrations, backup and recovery processes, and performance monitoring. Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, OpenTelemetry, CloudWatch, ELK/OpenSearch, distributed tracing, structured logging, dashboards, and alert management. Security & Reliability: IAM, secrets management, network isolation, audit logging, disaster recovery, incident response, runbooks, post-mortems, SLOs, SLIs, and production readiness practices. Nice to Have Experience with high-availability architectures, cloud cost optimization, and security hardening initiatives. Previous experience in fintech, financial services, or other mission-critical production environments. AWS certifications or an active role in comprehensive cloud transformation projects. Experience designing and supporting production-grade FastAPI/Python microservices. Hands-on experience monitoring, scaling, and troubleshooting Kafka or Redis Streams-based event-driven architectures. Experience defining SLOs/SLIs, managing error budgets, and conducting production readiness reviews. Working Model & Application Process The working model and benefits package will be shared during the HR process in accordance with company policies. Applicants are expected to submit: • A short CV/resume • GitHub profile and/or portfolio links (if available) • A brief note highlighting their strongest full-stack project experience

title: Full Stack Typescript Developer
description: Antalya'da Turizm sektöründe hizmet veren Seyahat Acentamıza Full Stack Typescript Developer aramaktayız. Antalya'da ikamet eden/edebilecek ve ofisten çalışabilecek olan adaylar öncelikli olarak değerlendirilecektir. Full Stack Typescript Developer Bu pozisyon kapsamında şirket bünyesinde geliştirilen "projelerin devam ettirilmesi" ve "yeni projeler geliştirilmesi" yer almaktadır. Temel yetkinlikler: * Full Stack developer olarak 3+ yıllık deneyim. * Typescript alanında ileri seviye deneyim. * Typescript ile yüksek performanslı, bakımı yapılabilir ve tekrar kullanılabilir kod yazmak. * Sürüm kontrol sistemlerini (git) kullanabilmek. Backend yetkinlikleri: * Backend teknolojileri ve prensipleri konusunda güçlü anlayış. * NodeJS frameworkleri (Express, Nest) ile backend uygulamaları geliştirme konusunda deneyimli. * Çeşitli ORM araçları ile (Sequelize, Prisma, Mongoose) çalışma konusunda deneyimli. * Çeşitli veritabanları ile (Postgresql, Mongodb, Redis) çalışma konusunda deneyimli. * SQL ve NoSQL konusunda bilgili. SQL yazma konusunda deneyimli. * Socket teknolojisi ile uygulamalar geliştirme konusunda deneyimli. * Bulut platformlarında (Aws, Google Cloud) deneyimli. * Docker teknolojisi hakkında bilgili, geliştirilen yazılımları containerize etme konusunda deneyimli. * Çoklu dil desteği içeren backend sistemleri geliştirme konusunda deneyimli. * Yayına alınmış bir backend projesini geliştirmiş ya da projede görev almış olmak. Frontend yetkinlikleri: * Frontend teknolojileri ve prensipleri konusunda güçlü anlayış. * React ve NextJS ile geliştirme yapmak konusunda deneyimli. * Çeşitli UI (Material UI, Bootstrap) paketleri ile çalışma konusunda deneyimli. * Çeşitli state management (Redux, Mobx) paketleri ile çalışma konusunda deneyimli. * Çeşitli stil kullanımları (CSS, SCSS, etc...) ile çalışma konusunda deneyimli. * Çeşitli javascript paketleri (Rxjs, Socket, i18n, Axios, Lodash, ...etc) ile çalışma konusunda deneyimli. * Çoklu dil desteği içeren frontend sistemleri geliştirme konusunda deneyimli. * Yayına alınmış bir frontend projesini geliştirmiş yada projede görev almış olmak. Size avantaj sağlayabilecek diğer yetkinlikler: * Açık kaynaklı projelere katkıda bulunmuş ve açık kaynak hakkında bilgili olmak. * Kod kalitesini yükselten (Eslint, Prettier, Babel, ...etc gibi) paketlerin entegrasyonu konusunda bilgili olmak. * Linux sistemlerde web projelerini yayın ortamına (Nginx, Environment) hazırlama konusunda bilgili olmak. * CI / CD (Jenkins, Github actions) süreçleri konusunda bilgili olmak. * Unit ve Integration testlerin sistemlere nasıl entegre edileceği konusunda bilgili olmak. * Yapay zeka eğitmek yada geliştirme ortamlarında projelere yapay zekayı entegre etmek konusunda bilgili olmak. * React Native ile cross platform mobil uygulama geliştirme konusunda bilgili olmak. Tam zamanlı Ofisten çalışma Antalya Başvurularınızı güncel özgeçmişiniz ve varsa GitHub, GitLab veya portföy bağlantılarınız ile birlikte paylaşabilirsiniz.

title: Senior Backend Developer
description: Senior Backend Developer Arıyoruz! İstanbul / Ataşehir’de faaliyet gösteren Çakmakçı Teknoloji bünyesinde görevlendirilmek üzere, backend geliştirme süreçlerinde deneyimli Senior Backend Developer arayışımız bulunmaktadır. Genel Bakış Hem bireysel kullanıcılara (B2C) hem de kurumsal iş ortaklarımıza (B2B) hizmet veren uçtan uca bir dijital ekosistem inşa ediyoruz. İstanbul ofisimizde bu yapının teknik omurgasını oluşturacak, sistem mimarisini bizzat kodlayarak hayata geçirecek ve teknik standartların uygulanmasında aktif rol alacak bir Senior Backend Developer arıyoruz. Temel Sorumluluklar Mimari ve Geliştirme: B2B ve B2C servislerinin bir arada çalıştığı, ölçeklenebilir ve yüksek performanslı backend mimarisini tasarlamak ve bizzat geliştirmek. Teknik Standartlar: Proje genelinde "Best Practices" standartlarını uygulamak, yüksek kaliteli kod yazımını sağlamak ve kod incelemeleri (Code Review) ile teknik sürdürülebilirliği korumak. Entegrasyon Optimizasyonu: Uygulamalar ve servisler arasındaki etkileşimin kesintisiz sürmesi için entegrasyon süreçlerini iyileştirmek ve optimize (fine-tune) etmek. Problem Çözme: Karmaşık sistem hatalarını analiz ederek kalıcı çözümler üretmek ve performans darboğazlarını gidermek. Deployment Yönetimi: Yeni sürümlerin ve güncellemelerin sistem genelinde pürüzsüz bir şekilde yayına alınması süreçlerinde aktif rol almak. Aradığımız Nitelikler Eğitim: Bilgisayar Mühendisliği veya ilgili alanlarda lisans derecesi. Deneyim: Çevik (Agile) ortamlarda, üretim seviyesinde (production-ready) backend geliştirme konusunda en az 5-6 yıl deneyim. Teknoloji Yığını: .NET Core (C#) dilinde ileri seviye yetkinlik. Mimari Uzmanlık: RESTful API, Mikroservis mimarileri ve Kuyruk sistemleri (RabbitMQ, Kafka vb.) konusunda derinlemesine bilgi. Veri Yönetimi: PostgreSQL ve MongoDB deneyimi; Redis ile etkili önbellekleme (caching) stratejileri kurabilme. Versiyon Kontrolü: Git akışları (branching, merging strategies) konusunda tam hakimiyet. Artı Puan (Nice to Have) Event-Driven: Olay güdümlü sistemler ve asenkron mimariler üzerine çalışma geçmişi. English Proficiency & Academic Background: İyi seviyede İngilizce bilgisine sahip, tercihen Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği, Matematik veya ilgili bölümlerden, saygın üniversitelerden mezun. Payments & E-Money Experience: Ödeme kuruluşları, elektronik para kuruluşları, fintech şirketleri veya ilgili finansal teknoloji alanlarında deneyim sahibi olmak tercih sebebidir.
